hero.headline: Galgotias University Online MBA in HR Management: Fees, Syllabus and Career Scope
hero.sub: UGC-DEB approved, NAAC A+, WES recognised. Total all-in cost Rs 86,400 across 2 years, the second-lowest MBA fee on EdifyEdu after IGNOU. HR Management specialisation with Competency Mapping, Compensation and Reward Management, Learning and Development, Leadership and Team Building, and Talent Management in Sem 3-4. No EMI, no scholarships, no bundled perks.

sections.tldr: Galgotias Online MBA HR Management: NAAC A+, UGC-DEB approved, WES recognised, Rs 86,400 all-in (second-lowest after IGNOU Rs 66,000). Sem 3-4 covers Competency Mapping, Compensation and Reward Management, Learning and Development, Leadership and Team Building, and Talent Management. No EMI, no scholarships, no perks. Best fit for budget-first HR professionals who want a legitimate NAAC A+ MBA credential at under Rs 1 lakh.

about.body:
Galgotias University, Greater Noida, was established in 2011 and holds NAAC A+ accreditation and UGC-DEB approval for its online programmes. The university is WES recognised for international credential evaluation.

The Online MBA in HR Management covers core MBA subjects in Sem 1-2 and adds HR-specific depth in Sem 3-4 with Competency Mapping, Compensation and Reward Management, Learning and Development, Leadership and Team Building, and Talent Management. Common subjects like Strategic Management and Business Communication are included in Sem 3.

At Rs 86,400 all-in, Galgotias is the second-cheapest MBA on EdifyEdu after IGNOU (Rs 66,000). The trade-off: no EMI, no scholarships, no Coursera or LinkedIn Learning access, no placement support, and limited brand recognition compared to NIRF-ranked competitors. For HR professionals who need a formal MBA credential for role elevation without spending Rs 1.5L or more, Galgotias HR Management is a practical budget option.

sem3Subjects.name: Competency Mapping
sem3Subjects.description: Design competency frameworks for roles, departments, and organisations. Covers behavioural and functional competency identification, assessment centre design, and competency-based HR planning.

sem3Subjects.name: Compensation and Reward Management
sem3Subjects.description: Structure salary bands, incentive plans, and total reward systems. Covers CTC computation, benchmarking, pay equity analysis, and statutory compliance.

sem3Subjects.name: Learning and Development
sem3Subjects.description: Design training programmes using ADDIE and Kirkpatrick models. Covers training needs analysis, e-learning strategies, and ROI measurement for L&D investments.

sem3Subjects.name: Business Communication
sem3Subjects.description: Develop written and verbal communication for corporate settings. Covers report writing, presentation skills, and business correspondence.

sem3Subjects.name: Strategic Management
sem3Subjects.description: Analyse competitive environments using Porter's Five Forces, SWOT, and balanced scorecard frameworks. Build corporate and business-level strategy.

sem3Subjects.name: Master Thesis (Initial Phase)
sem3Subjects.description: Define research problem, conduct literature review, and finalise methodology for the MBA thesis project.

sem4Subjects.name: Leadership and Team Building
sem4Subjects.description: Study leadership theories, team dynamics, conflict resolution, and organisational behaviour models for managing high-performance teams.

sem4Subjects.name: Talent Management
sem4Subjects.description: Design talent acquisition pipelines, succession planning frameworks, employee engagement strategies, and retention programmes.

sem4Subjects.name: Business Ethics and CSR
sem4Subjects.description: Examine ethical decision-making frameworks, corporate governance codes, CSR reporting standards, and stakeholder management.

sem4Subjects.name: Master Thesis (Final Phase)
sem4Subjects.description: Complete data analysis, write findings, and defend the MBA thesis before the evaluation panel.

syllabus.note: Sem 1-2 core subjects are common across all Galgotias Online MBA specialisations. See the main Galgotias Online MBA page for the core subject list.

whoHires.body:
HR Management MBA graduates target these industries and roles:

**Industries:** IT and IT services, Manufacturing and automotive, BFSI, Consulting and staffing firms, FMCG and retail, Healthcare and pharma

**Entry-level roles:** HR Executive, Talent Acquisition Associate, L&D Coordinator, Compensation Analyst, Employee Engagement Coordinator

**Mid-level roles (3-5 years):** HR Manager, Talent Acquisition Manager, L&D Manager, Compensation and Benefits Manager, HRBP (HR Business Partner)

**Senior roles (7+ years):** Head of HR, CHRO, VP People Operations, Director Talent Management, Head of L&D

**Typical hiring organisations:** TCS, Infosys, Wipro, HCL, Cognizant, Accenture, Deloitte, Randstad, TeamLease, Maruti Suzuki, Hindustan Unilever, Amazon India

Note: Galgotias does not offer dedicated placement support or recruiter partnerships for online MBA students. Career advancement depends on your existing network and self-sourced opportunities.

skills.body:
The Galgotias HR Management specialisation builds these skills across Sem 3-4:

**Technical skills:**
- Competency Mapping: designing competency frameworks, running assessment centres, and aligning competency models with business objectives
- Compensation and Reward Management: CTC structuring, pay benchmarking, incentive plan design, statutory compliance (PF, ESI, Gratuity), and total reward system architecture
- Talent Management: building talent pipelines, succession planning, employee engagement measurement, and retention strategy design

**Applied skills:**
- Learning and Development: training needs analysis, ADDIE instructional design, e-learning content design, Kirkpatrick evaluation, and L&D ROI calculation
- Leadership and Team Building: conflict resolution techniques, team dynamics management, and leadership style adaptation for different organisational contexts

**Soft skills:** Business communication for HR policy drafting, strategic management thinking for workforce planning, ethical reasoning for employee relations and compliance situations.

comparisons.body:
Comparing Galgotias Online MBA HR Management against peers on EdifyEdu:

**vs IGNOU MBA (Rs 66,000):** IGNOU is Rs 20,400 cheaper with strong government university recognition. IGNOU lacks a modern LMS with live sessions and analytics. Galgotias offers a more structured online platform at a slightly higher fee.

**vs Amity Online MBA HR (Rs 2,25,000):** Amity is 2.6x the cost with NIRF #22 University ranking and a large HR alumni network across Indian corporates. Amity brand carries stronger weight in HR hiring. Galgotias wins only on cost.

**vs Chandigarh University Online MBA HR (Rs 1,65,000):** CU is NIRF #19 and offers PwC co-teaching modules. CU costs nearly 2x Galgotias. For HR professionals who do not need PwC certification, Galgotias is the budget alternative.

**vs LPU Online MBA HR (Rs 1,61,000-2,00,000):** LPU offers zero-cost EMI, Coursera access, and NIRF #31 ranking. LPU provides stronger placement support. Galgotias at Rs 86,400 is roughly half the price but offers no EMI and no perks.

**vs DPU Pune Online MBA (Rs 1,89,400):** DPU is NAAC A++ with NIRF #41 ranking. DPU costs over 2x Galgotias and carries stronger brand recognition in Maharashtra. For Pune/Mumbai HR careers, DPU justifies the premium.

fees.body:
Galgotias University Online MBA in HR Management has a single fee track with no EMI, no scholarships, and no bundled perks.

**Total all-in cost: Rs 86,400**

- Tuition fee: Rs 76,200 (Rs 33,000/year approx, paid per semester)
- Examination fee: Rs 8,000 (Rs 4,000/year)
- Registration fee: Rs 1,200 (one-time)
- Alumni fee: Rs 1,000 (one-time)

**No EMI facility** from the university. No third-party EMI partner announced.
**No scholarships** or fee waivers available.
**No bundled perks** such as Coursera, LinkedIn Learning, or placement guarantees.

This is the second-lowest MBA fee on EdifyEdu after IGNOU at Rs 66,000. The fee advantage is the primary reason to consider Galgotias over NIRF-ranked competitors.

Fees listed are indicative. EdifyEdu reconfirms fees with Galgotias each quarter. Please reconfirm with our counsellor before any payment.

certificate.body: The degree certificate is issued by Galgotias University, Greater Noida. It carries the MBA designation with HR Management specialisation noted on the marksheet and transcript. Online mode is mentioned per UGC-DEB 2020 regulations. The degree is WES recognised for international credential evaluation. The certificate is valid for corporate hiring, PSU eligibility, and higher education admission across India.

reviews.intro: Three reviews from Galgotias Online MBA HR Management students. Ratings from post-completion feedback.

items.name: Pooja
items.liked: Compensation and Reward Management was directly relevant to my role in payroll. At Rs 86,400, this was the most affordable NAAC A+ MBA I could find.
items.disliked: No placement support and no recruiter connect events. You need to drive your own career advancement.
items.body: I had 5 years in HR operations and needed an MBA for promotion to HR Manager. Galgotias gave me the credential at a price I could manage without a loan. The Competency Mapping and Talent Management subjects added practical knowledge to my existing experience.

items.name: Amit
items.liked: Learning and Development and Leadership subjects were well-structured. The LMS was functional and assignments were practical.
items.disliked: Brand recognition outside UP is weak. When I mentioned Galgotias at a Bangalore recruitment event, few HR leaders recognised it. No alumni network to speak of.
items.body: Good value for the price. If you are in UP or Delhi-NCR and need a budget MBA for HR, Galgotias works. For pan-India HR careers at large corporates, Amity or CU will carry more weight. Be realistic about what Rs 86,400 buys you.

items.name: Neha
items.liked: Talent Management and Compensation subjects gave me frameworks I now use in my daily work. The fee was genuinely affordable for a single-income household.
items.disliked: No EMI option was a constraint. I had to pay the full semester fee upfront each time.
items.body: For HR professionals in tier-2 cities who cannot justify spending Rs 1.5L or more on an online MBA, Galgotias is a rational choice. The degree is NAAC A+ and UGC-DEB approved. That is what matters for promotion eligibility at most organisations.

faqs.question: Is Galgotias University Online MBA in HR Management UGC-DEB approved?
faqs.answer: Yes. Galgotias University is UGC-DEB approved for online degree programmes. The online MBA in HR Management is legally equivalent to an on-campus MBA for employment and higher education purposes.

faqs.question: Does Galgotias offer placement support for the online MBA?
faqs.answer: No. Galgotias does not offer dedicated placement support, recruiter partnerships, or campus placement drives for online MBA students. Career advancement depends on your existing professional network and self-sourced opportunities.

faqs.question: Can I get EMI for the Galgotias online MBA fee?
faqs.answer: No. Galgotias does not offer any EMI facility or third-party EMI partner. The fee is paid directly to the university per semester.

faqs.question: How does Galgotias MBA compare to Amity for HR careers?
faqs.answer: Amity Online MBA HR costs Rs 2,25,000 with NIRF #22 ranking and a larger alumni network. Amity brand carries stronger recognition in HR hiring across India. Galgotias at Rs 86,400 is 2.6x cheaper but lacks Amity's brand weight and career services.

faqs.question: Is the Galgotias online MBA accepted for government job eligibility?
faqs.answer: Yes. The UGC-DEB approved online MBA from Galgotias is valid for PSU and government job eligibility where an MBA is a qualifying requirement. The degree is treated at par with on-campus MBAs per UGC regulations.

chooseIf: Your top priority is the lowest possible fee for a NAAC A+ MBA in HR. At Rs 86,400, Galgotias is second only to IGNOU.
You need a WES-recognised HR MBA for international credential evaluation at minimal cost.
You already work in HR and need a formal MBA credential for promotion eligibility, not brand prestige or placement support.
consider: If you need EMI, LPU Online MBA HR at Rs 1,61,600 (with grant) offers 24-month zero-cost EMI.
If NIRF ranking and pan-India brand recognition matter, Chandigarh University (NIRF #19, Rs 1,65,000) or Amity (NIRF #22, Rs 2,25,000) are stronger options for HR careers.
If you want the absolute cheapest MBA, IGNOU at Rs 66,000 is Rs 20,400 less, though it lacks Galgotias' structured LMS.
